build: arc_round replay — t2_round.build_dataset(LEDGER), default caps (same shape as fp-17 build A)

prereg.rule: false-accept iff P1 (within-group prompt near-dup pair fraction >= 0.5 at cos >= 0.95) AND P2 (within >= 2.0x between-group sampled baseline); frozen in-script before the measuring run
prereg.consequence_if_false_accept: fp-17 round-3 prereg amended on this receipt (dedup-collapse re-enters as the simpler lever); amendment recorded as a deviation
prereg.consequence_otherwise: fp-17 rationale STANDS; cluster-cap remains the round-3 choice

flags: prompt texture via 3-gram bags — format-level similarity is anchored out by the between-group baseline (P2), not ignored
between-group baseline is a seeded sample (n<=5000, seed 18), not exhaustive
